title: actinella anthemoides
intro: Actinella anthemoides, also known as Actinella or Anthemis anthemoides, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. Its health benefits include relieving symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and bloating, as well as reducing fever and pain. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, with the leaves and flowers being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
